title: 2X Maxblue DA29-00020B Fridge Water Filter, Compatible with Samsung® DA29-00020B, HAF-CIN EXP, DA29-00020A, DA29-00019A, DA97-08006, DA97-08043ABC, Kenmore 46-9101, AP5271937, REFSVC, HDX-FMS-2
features: 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞: 𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭 𝐢𝐬 𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝, 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐬𝐪𝐮𝐚𝐫𝐞. 𝐑𝐞𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐜𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐃𝐀𝟐𝟗-𝟎𝟎𝟎𝟐𝟎𝐁, 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐃𝐀𝟗𝟕-𝟏𝟕𝟑𝟕𝟔𝐁.
Maxblue refrigerator water filter not only features prior filtration performance but also certified by authority NSF/ANSI 42 and 372 for lead-free materials.

Brilliant filtration: The filter can remduce a wide range of harmful substances in water including heavy metals, chlorine, odor, THM, VOCs, particles, cadmium, and all other major impurities, which has been tested by an independent third-party laboratory.
Perfect fit: Our professional research team make effort to produce perfect fit refrigerator filters with exquisite engineering design without water leakage issues.
Premium filter material: Maxblue adopts 100% selected coconut shell carbon block that contains larger surface area and more micropores than inferior carbon block.
Pure-tasting water: The adopted filter material in this replacement refrigerator filter adsorbs better. So, you get clean, fresh, and great-tasting water at all times.

Month install stickers: Simply stick it onto your replacement water filters to know when it’s time to change it. Keep you drinking fresh with a little add-on. The filter life is 6 months or 300 gallons, which will vary based on the water condition.
Hassle-free installation: The way we spend our time defines who we are. Maxblue strives to save your precious time by offering tool-free refrigerator filter replacement.

Be responsible for each product: Each product or even a small component manufactured by Maxblue has to pass extremely high-standard examinations to reach the top requirement on the market. It’s not an ending if the filter leaves our factory. We will take responsibility for each of them.

Replacement for models: Samsung DA29-00020B, DA-97-08006A-B, DA-97-08006A, DA-97-08006A-B, DA-97-08006B, DA29-00019A, DA2900019A, DA2900020A, DA2900020A, RF28HMEDBSR, DA29-00020A/B, HAF-CIN/EXP, RF4287HARS, RF263TEAESG, A97-08006A, RH22H9010SR, RF23J9011SR, RS25J500DSG, RF23HCEDBSR, RS25H5111SR, RF263BEAESG, RF28HFEDBSR, RF22KREDBSR, RS25J500DSR, RF28HDEDBSR, RF28K9380SG, RF25HMEDBSR, RF26J7500SR, DA29-00020A, HAF-CIN, HAF-CIN-EXP, HAF-CINEXP, HAFCIN, Kenmore 04609101000, 09101, 46-9101, 469101.
description: Product Description Why MAXBLUE? NSF certified for the reduction of chlorine, taste and odor to get fresh-tasting water Certified to NSF/ANSI 42&372 for lead-free material With a filter life of 6 months or 300 gallons (whichever comes first) Compatible with the following models: Samsung: DA29-00020B, DA29-00020A, DA2900020A, DA29-00019A, DA2900019A, DA-97-08006A, DA-97-08006A-B, DA-97-08006B, DA97-08006A-B, HAF-CIN, HAF-CIN-EXP, HAF-CINEXP, HAFCIN Kenmore: 04609101000, 09101, 46-9101, 469101, 9101 Please note this is a compatible spare part and the manufacturers' names and part numbers have been used for reference purposes only. Maxblue is an independent brand. NSF/ANSI 42&372 certified Tested and certified by NSF/ANSI 42&372, the filter uses lead-free material and can effectively reduce 97% of chlorine, taste and odor. Multiple filtration performance Using multi-stage filtration technology and premium coconut shell carbon block to reduce potentially harmful contaminants from your water. Meanwhile, the refrigerator water filter returns healthy and beneficial minerals back to water. Carbon block made of coconut shell The carbon block we use is made of Sri Lanka coconut shell, which is good at adsorbing chlorine, organics and so on. The MB-F27 is compatible with the following part numbers: Samsung DA29-00020A DA29-00020B DA2900020A / DA2900020B DA97-08043ABC 09101 / 46-9101 / 9101 / 469101 / 04609101000 DA-97-08006A-B /
